name: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf
about: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in McKinney, TX, offering six state-of-the-art simulators for golfers to play courses from around the world. The facility provides a social atmosphere with multiple TVs for watching sports, a full bar, and food service in a separate grille area. Golfers can book tee times by the hour, with bays accommodating up to four players, and the venue offers both monthly and annual membership options for frequent players. It caters to golfers looking for a relaxed environment to practice, play, and socialize, with options for private events and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Full bar and sports viewing TVs for a social atmosphere
Flexible pricing with hourly bookings and membership options
Private event and league hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Grille service available with food options; no outside food or drinks allowed in the hitting area

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary golf equipment, including clubs and balls, for use on their simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed in the hitting area, but the venue has a full bar and grille service available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour for one person to play 18 holes, so two players would need about two hours, etc.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue accommodates families and has a casual atmosphere suitable for junior golfers and beginners.
